texto: Secrets, like tyrants, have influence that extends far beyond their own thrones. To silence their oppressive powers, they must be uncrowned.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Ina Catrinescu: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Secrets, like tyrants, have influence that extends far beyond their own thrones. To silence their…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, honesty, secrets pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao-noturna e termino.

texto: I look forward to the day when business is less about being busy and more about being of service. When Houses of Cards, become Houses of Hearts. We can no longer afford to squander our passion on cold economics. It is time to reclaim our most valuable commodity and devote it to what’s right. Devote it to concern & creation. To meaningful encounters & purpose-bound experiences. May we no longer do business, but build places of thriving instead; ruled by one truth only ~ the wisdom of our hearts.
explicacao: Citação de Ina Catrinescu sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “I look forward to the day when business is less about being busy and more about being of service.…” articula reflexao, business, emotional-intelligence em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como emotional-intelligence e heart.

texto: What if you knew before you were born that love will not be a given? If you learned that rejection would be the blueprint for your entire life? If you were the one calling the shots, would you still choose to be born?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Ina Catrinescu que provoca vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. Ao questionar “What if you knew before you were born that love will not be a given? If you learned that rejectio…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre vida, birth, living, com foco em living.

texto: Just as only one discordant note has the power to disturb an entire symphony, the accordance between a body and its soul can be a broken by only one discordant event. To ensure and maintain an optimal fit, one must deliberately and continuously choreograph the equilibrium of the body, mind, and soul.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Ina Catrinescu sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “Just as only one discordant note has the power to disturb an entire symphony, the accordance betw…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, body, equilibrium, útil em momentos de equilibrium e mind-body-spirit.
